text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after the Tenno Sho, Mejiro McQueen
gets a call from her grandmother, who entrusts
McQueen with showing the Mejiro family a new
path forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The suddenness of this request leaves Mejiro
McQueen struggling to sort out her thoughts and
feelings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she receives encouragement from
Mejiro Ryan, who declares her desire to become
even stronger. Ryan then challenges McQueen to
another showdown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen sees her sister's resolve and accepts the
challenge to compete in the Takarazuka Kinen,
saying her victory will display her resolve to
shoulder the responsibility of the Mejiro name.
